# MuleSoft Aggregators Module

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.1) of Aggregators Module documentation.
> See [Aggregators Module llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/aggregators-module/llms-full.txt) for all the Aggregators Module documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Using Aggregators in a Cluster](https://docs.mulesoft.com/aggregators-module/latest/aggregators-cluster.md)
- [Aggregators Module Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/aggregators-module/latest/aggregators-examples.md)
- [Group-Based Aggregator Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/aggregators-module/latest/aggregators-group-example.md)
- [Aggregators Module Reference 1.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/aggregators-module/latest/aggregators-module-reference.md)
- [Aggregators Module Multiple Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/aggregators-module/latest/aggregators-multiple-examples.md)
- [Size-Based Aggregator Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/aggregators-module/latest/aggregators-size-example.md)
- [Configure Size-Based Aggregator Timeout and Max Size Fields](https://docs.mulesoft.com/aggregators-module/latest/aggregators-size-timeout.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Aggregators Module 1.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/aggregators-module/latest/aggregators-studio-configuration.md)
- [Synchronous Versus Asynchronous Aggregations](https://docs.mulesoft.com/aggregators-module/latest/aggregators-sync-async.md)
- [Time-Based Aggregator Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/aggregators-module/latest/aggregators-time-example.md)
- [Troubleshooting Aggregators Module](https://docs.mulesoft.com/aggregators-module/latest/aggregators-troubleshooting.md)
- [Aggregators Module XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/aggregators-module/latest/aggregators-xml-maven.md)
- [Aggregators Module 1.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/aggregators-module/latest/index.md)
